providerARNs.description: A list of the Amazon Cognito user pool ARNs.

authType.description: An optional customer-defined field for authorization type.

authorizerUri.description: The authorizer's URI. For TOKEN or REQUEST authorizers, this is the Lambda function URI.

authorizerCredentials.description: The credentials required for the authorizer as an IAM role ARN.

identitySource.description: The identity source for which authorization is requested.

identityValidationExpression.description: A validation expression for the incoming identity token.

authorizerResultTtlInSeconds.description: The TTL in seconds of cached authorizer results. Max 3600.
